schema.appDescription: Calculate monthly and annual professional tax deducted from salary. Rates vary by state — Maharashtra, Karnataka, West Bengal covered.

howToSteps.name: Enter your details
howToSteps.text: Fill in the input fields for the Professional Tax Calculator. All inputs have smart defaults.

howToSteps.name: View instant results
howToSteps.text: Results update in real time as you type — no submit button needed.

howToSteps.name: Explore breakdown
howToSteps.text: Open the year-by-year breakdown table to see how your numbers change over time.

howToSteps.name: Compare scenarios
howToSteps.text: Adjust the inputs to compare different scenarios and find the best option for your situation.

faq.q: How accurate is the Professional Tax Calculator?
faq.a: The Professional Tax Calculator uses standard financial formulas. Results are indicative; actual figures depend on your lender or financial institution's policies.

faq.q: Is the Professional Tax Calculator free to use?
faq.a: Yes, the Professional Tax Calculator on CalcPhi is completely free with no registration required.
No. All calculations happen in your browser. We do not store any of your financial data.

faq.q: How often are the Professional Tax Calculator rates updated?
faq.a: Rates in examples are updated periodically to reflect current market conditions. Always verify with your bank or advisor.

faq.q: Can I use the Professional Tax Calculator on mobile?
faq.a: Yes. CalcPhi is fully mobile-optimised. The calculator works on all modern smartphones and tablets.
Anyone in India planning their finances can benefit from the Professional Tax Calculator. It's designed for both beginners and experienced investors.

examples.heading: Salaried employee earning ₹1 lakh/month
examples.text: The Professional Tax Calculator shows the exact deduction based on the salary slab for your state.
